author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 60dffb06. Added STRIDED_COPY_PTX kernel unrolled for up to 8 dims, gpu_strided_copy / gpu_strided_copy_f64 public API with validation helper, backend trait method strided_copy_{f32,f64}, and contiguous_t GPU fast path that dispatches non-contiguous CUDA tensors to the kernel (falls back to CPU for rank > 8 or missing backend). 10 kernel unit tests + 5 end-to-end integration tests verified on RTX 3090 — transpose, 3D/4D permute, column slice, f64, autograd preservation all byte-identical to CPU reference.
